name: Learning from World Feedback: Why Model Uncertainty Fails as a Risk Signal in Model-Based RL
summary: arXiv:2607.16591v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The RLxF programme argues that learning signals should come from world feedback rather than from internal model proxies. We instantiate this positi...
description: arXiv:2607.16591v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The RLxF programme argues that learning signals should come from world feedback rather than from internal model proxies. We instantiate this position in safe model-based control and distil it into three concrete design principles. Empirically, across four world-model architectures spanning a 2x MSE range, MPC planning is statistically equivalent...
author: Zhaohui Wang
